2188140.name: RPGScenery - Lost City
2188140.description:
Somewhere where the mountains, the desert, the jungle, and the water meet, lies hidden the lost city, which holds fabulous knowledge and treasures. Most of the buildings have already been swallowed up by the sand, and what is left is mostly covered by plants. Beneath the plants, the buildings reveal the wealth and knowledge of the past. No one knows the real history of the city anymore, maybe there are still some traces of the past left inside the buildings...

This DLC contains 5 battlemaps to help you to bring your TTRPG session to the next level
